query: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailVerified TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailVerifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email_verified ON users(emailVerified);
